title: Contact — Jhon Romero
description: Get in touch with Jhon Romero — Odoo developer and Full Stack TypeScript engineer. Available for full-time and freelance opportunities.
subtitle: I'm available for full-time positions and freelance projects — remote, on-site, or relocation.

items.title: Full-time role

items.title: Freelance projects
